steps.t: Dull blades can be found on weapon-racks in the North Wing of Durin's Threshold. You should collect several dull blades for restoration in the newly-l…
The forge of the North Wing can be found near Athils. You should use the forge to restore the blades you collected.
Athils is in the North Wing of Durin's Threshold, overseeing the work being done there. You should bring the newly restored blades to Athils.
